title: mikania citriodora
intro: Mikania citriodora, also known as Lemon Mikania or Lemon Vine, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Mikania citriodora include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of various digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine for its therapeutic properties.
